name: Cosmic Flare
name_jp: シューティング・ソニック
desc: Target 1 "Stardust" Synchro Monster you control; this turn, if that Synchro Monster you control battles an opponent's monster, shuffle that opponent's monster into the Deck at the start of the Damage Step. If a "Stardust" Synchro Monster you control would Tribute itself to activate its effect, you can banish this card from your GY instead.
eff: Target 1 "Stardust" Synchro Monster you control; this turn, if that Synchro Monster you control battles an opponent's monster, shuffle that opponent's monster into the Deck at the start of the Damage Step. If a "Stardust" Synchro Monster you control would Tribute itself to activate its effect, you can banish this card from your GY instead.

action: Returns from your opponent's field to your opponent's Deck
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
